title: Aggro Doll
description: Aggro doll which allow you to taunt nearest monsters!
body:
**Aggro Doll** is a lightweight utility mod that gives you full control over enemy attention on the battlefield. Instead of a direct taunt, activation now applies the “Aggro” effect to the player, turning them into a living target for nearby hostile mobs.

Perfect for tanks in RPG parties, coordinated boss fights, or controlled mob farming.

### ⚔️ Core Feature

**Mass Taunt** — Upon activation, the player gains the “Aggro” effect for 20 seconds, forcing ALL hostile mobs to target and attack them.

**Cooldown:** 10 seconds

### ✨ Visual Feedback

**Enemies:** Provoked mobs emit haunting soul particles, clearly marking those affected by the taunt.

**Player:** Upon activation, the player receives a temporary Glowing effect, confirming successful use of the item.

### 🧩 Lightweight & Compatible

- Minimal performance impact
- Designed to integrate smoothly into existing modpacks
- No complex dependencies or mechanics

### ⚙️ Configuration

Config options available for **NeoForge 1.21.1+**
